mapper.sql: CASE WHEN t.end_date IS NOT NULL AND t.end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN t.start_date IS NOT NULL AND t.start_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'UPCOMING' WHEN t.start_date IS NOT NULL AND t.end_date IS NOT NULL AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN t.start_date AND t.end_date THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'UPCOMING' END
t.trip_id, t.title, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.user_id, t.group_id, g.group_name, t.created_at, t.updated_at, AS status
t.trip_id, t.title, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.user_id, t.group_id, g.group_name, t.data, t.created_at, t.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM trips t INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = t.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} INNER JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = t.group_id
= #{status}
ORDER BY t.start_date ASC NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC, t.trip_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trips ( title, start_date, end_date, user_id, group_id, data ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{userId}, #{groupId}, #{data,typeHandler=com.ssafy.wswg.model.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}::jsonb )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM trips t LEFT JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = t.group_id WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId}

SELECT
FROM trips t LEFT JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = t.group_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.start_date ASC NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC, t.trip_id DESC

SELECT
FROM trips t INNER JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = t.group_id WHERE t.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY t.start_date ASC NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC, t.trip_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE trips SET title = #{title}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, data = #{data,typeHandler=com.ssafy.wswg.model.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}::jsonb WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}
